About

A quick intro

Final-year B.Tech Computer Science student with two data analytics internships and hands-on experience turning raw data into business decisions. Skilled across the full workflow — data cleaning and EDA in Python and SQL, through to KPI dashboards and stakeholder reporting in Power BI and Tableau.
